description:
c9watch is a lightweight macOS desktop app that gives you a real-time dashboard of every Claude Code session running on your machine.

Built with Tauri, Rust, and Svelte - c9watch automatically discovers all your Claude Code sessions regardless of where you start them (VS Code, Zed, iTerm2, or any terminal). No plugins required. No vendor lock-in.

Key Features:
  ✓ Auto-discovery - Detects all running Claude Code sessions at the OS level
  ✓ Real-time status - See which sessions are Working, Need Permission, or Idle
  ✓ Conversation viewer - Expand any session to view the full conversation
  ✓ Session control - Stop sessions, open terminals, or rename for easier
tracking
  ✓ Multi-project view - Sessions grouped by project with git branch info
  ✓ Lightweight - Built with Tauri and Rust, not Electron
fulltitle: c9watch - Monitor All Your Claude Code Sessions from One Dashboard
